style_effects: Gentle sparkling dust trails drift lazily upward like captured stardust, each particle refracting soft pastel light into iridescent rainbows. A delicate petal-shaped aura pulses gently around its body in pale lavender and mint green, with faint musical note vibrations shimmering in the air. The lighting mood is a warm, dreamy twilight glow with soft golden highlights, casting a serene, ethereal ambiance. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
